name: Suspicious Copy Command from Admin Share
notes:
This is rule detects suspicious copy command from admin share.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali
SIGMA Title: Copy from Admin Share
SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious copy command to or from an Admin share or remote


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\\\\%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%$%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\sysvol\%') AQL filter query

when the event matches ((((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\robocopy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\xcopy.exe') or (LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%robocopy.exe%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%xcopy.exe%')) or ((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\cmd.exe' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%cmd.exe%') and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy%')) or (((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\powershell.exe%' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\pwsh.exe%') or (LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%powershell.exe%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%pwsh.dll%')) and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy-item%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cpi %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% cp %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%move %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%move-item%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% mi %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% mv %'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Copy Command from Admin Share on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches ((LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\\\\%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%$%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\sysvol\%') AQL filter query

AND when the event matches ((((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\robocopy.exe' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\xcopy.exe') or (LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%robocopy.exe%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%xcopy.exe%')) or ((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\cmd.exe' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%cmd.exe%') and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy%')) or (((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\powershell.exe%' or LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%\pwsh.exe%') or (LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%powershell.exe%' or LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%pwsh.dll%')) and (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy-item%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%copy %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cpi %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% cp %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%move %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%move-item%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% mi %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '% mv %'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Copy Command from Admin Share
Event description: Detects suspicious copy command from admin share.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
